column1: Hey Charley, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
yooo charlie was it Punta Cana and Cancun you were lookin at?
Okay bet yea that's where I'll be too
How many ppl in your group do far
trying to stay under $1.5k including flights if possible 🤣
lol my b man missed your text. I feel you tho thats def possible lol
word we've had a couple other tulane groups come through. y'all always have good energy lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
ASAP!!! definitely in the next few days
yea lets run it! I got you lol
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
is that you on the website
Hey quick question actually, which airport is best for you? Gonna see what it looks like if we potentially added flights
aight so, I sent you pricing without flights because its gonna be cheaper for you to get flights separately on your own
heres a good flight I found that you can each get https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/nsjYKbvbqLNQZUea8
lmk if you got the email I sent over
riu republica is maximum 3 people per room?
we wanna do riu republica for 5 nights with 2 rooms for 3 people
and if we pay tmrw we get a free booze cruise??
okay cool. yea riu is 3 people per room max. also theres a requirement for one person in each room to be 21+ for check in
is there any way we could confirm everything today?
yea for sure lets do it! will work on getting the two rooms pulled this afternoon
Le gustó “yea for sure lets do it! will work on getting the two rooms pulled this afternoon”
yo! gonna email you the reservation rn
sent that over did you get it?
what happens if one of my friends can't come anymore?
but everyone else can pay today
All good well just remove one of the slots
I'll keep the pricing the same
wait we might be able to recruit a different girl
Yea do your thang just lmk
basically my friend who can't pay right now is waiting for her boss to let her know if she gets time off
so what should i do with her slot in the reservation
probably within the next few days but she's in europe right now so she's asleep currently
Okay cool, we'll leave it open for now
my friend will know by thursday and if her boss approves she will pay right away
she just found out she had the week off! she's submitting deposit today
hey just checkin in, you and Ella are a little behind on payments, everything good?
omg so sorry, totally forgot. i can pay tonight and she can pay tmrw
Okay dope sounds good! Just wanna make sure yall get processed
Whenever I fill out the agreement form it says that theres an internal error
And then I cant submit the payment
yo! just had another group say the same, working on getting this fixed!
its once you fill the agreement form, you get a 404 screen?
Got you thanks for the info. so it doesnt let you get to the payment page at all? its not like after you submit the card info right
Just wanna make sure I give the tech team the exact issue
Its once you press the submit on the customer agreement?
No it stops working after I submit the terms of agreement
Liked “Its once you press the submit on the customer agre…”
okay got you. working on it! apologies on that
Le encantó “okay got you. working on it! apologies on that”
sup Charley checkin back in, did things work for you for the payment?
Just paid! I'll tell Ella to right now
sup Charley! when you get a sec, can you have each person in the group add their flight info into their accounts
we're gonna start scheduling your airport transportation with us
sorry you cause us over mardi gras weekend 😂
yo Charley! is Ella on the same flight as anyone else in the group?
yes she's on the same flight as us
Bet, I'll add that in fir her
hi! my birthday is on the 21st and i was wondering if there's any fun restaurants in the area i could take my friends to
theres a dope restaurant called Noah thats a short shuttle ride down the road
yooo Charley did y'all wanna add any of the party pass tickets or booze cruise event to your trip?
waitttt i thought we got free booze cruise since we signed up early enough
also i need to change my departure flight is that chill
what is the new time ill add it in rn
is there like a convenience store near/at the resort
Yea there is one in the front lobby area
what day is the booze cruise
Monday the 23rd. has anyone from the party pass team met up with you yet to get you the wristbands you need for the cruise?
we got an email with the passes
how do we get the wristbands
yea so that email was just your vouchers. have any Go Blue staff met you on the resort at all yet?
oh bet. yea you'll get situated when you get there today. just screenshot your vouchers from that email
we don't see the go blue tours guy
wait how do we get to coco bongo if we wanna go tn
So our onsite staff will have all the details you need on how to purchase. Have you gotten to meet any of the Go Blue Tours staff yet?
hey checkin in, did you find any of the onsite staff?
